# comtrade

> Download and analyse international merchandise and services trade data from the United Nations Comtrade database. Install with `install.packages("comtrade")`.

Version: 0.1.1. License: MIT.

## Functions

- [`ct_available()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_available.html): Check Data Availability
- [`ct_balance()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_balance.html): Trade Balance by Partner
- [`ct_cache_clear()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_cache_clear.html): Clear the Comtrade Cache
- [`ct_commodities()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_commodities.html): Search Commodity Codes
- [`ct_compare()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_compare.html): Compare Countries
- [`ct_concordance()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_concordance.html): Convert Between Trade Classifications
- [`ct_growth()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_growth.html): Trade Growth Over Time
- [`ct_hhi()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_hhi.html): Trade Concentration Index (HHI)
- [`ct_rca()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_rca.html): Revealed Comparative Advantage (Balassa Index)
- [`ct_reporters()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_reporters.html): List Reporter Countries
- [`ct_services()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_services.html): Get Services Trade Data
- [`ct_set_key()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_set_key.html): Set the Comtrade API Key
- [`ct_share()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_share.html): World Trade Share
- [`ct_top_partners()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_top_partners.html): Top Trading Partners
- [`ct_top_products()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_top_products.html): Top Export or Import Products
- [`ct_trade()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/ct_trade.html): Get Bilateral Trade Data

## Documentation

- [Full reference](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/comtrade/reference/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/charlescoverdale/comtrade)
- [CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=comtrade)
